rulings.Case Title: VERA V WITIUK VS. JANE KNOP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Substitute Personal Representative Or Alternatively, Successors In Interest For Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File A Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 1, 2019 line 5. PLAINTIFF VERA WITIUK'S Motion To Substitute Personal Representative Or Alternatively, Successors In Interest For Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File A Second Amended Complaint Continued to August 12, 2019 for supplemental briefing. No later than July19, 2019 the moving party to provide authority for the following propositions: (1) As the sole executor named in Ms. Witiuk's will, Mr. Lunty is the personal representative of her estate; Reply 1:24-25; (2) No probate is even necessary to appoint a personal representative. Reply 2:18-19. To the extent the moving party relies on CCP 377.31 for this proposition, moving party is also to provide authority interpreting CCP 377.31 in such manner. Supplemental briefing not to exceed 5 pages. Opposing party may submit supplemental opposition addressing the issues listed above no later than July 31, 2019. If a personal representative is appointed in Canadian proceeding before August 12, 2019 the parties shall submit a joint brief informing the Court of the appointment and the powers of the personal representative (regarding litigation) and whether the appointment changes the posture of the motion regarding substitution no later than August 14, 2019 by 2:00 p.m. If a brief is not filed on August 14, 2019 the Court will assume that no personal representative has been appointed. = (501/CFH)

DEFENDANT ARLENE ERLACH'S Motion To Dismiss This Action For Failure To Join Indispensable Parties OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005. Additionally, moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B; no courtesy copies of the moving papers received as of 2:44 pm, June 28, 2019. = (501/CFH)
